title: Lord Howe Island
description: Small, picturesque island featuring white-sand beaches, tropical forests, surfing & scuba diving.
searchString: caravan parks Lord Howe Island NSW

title: Arajilla Retreat
description: Serene resort with chic suites and an Ayurvedic spa, plus complimentary meals and airport transfers.
address: Old Settlement Beach, Lagoon Rd, Lord Howe Island NSW 2898, Australia
hotelDescription:
Among lush grounds on the west coast of Lord Howe Island, this polished, all-suite spa resort is 1.9 km from Lord Howe Island Golf Club and 4.1 km from Lord Howe Island Airport.
 Contemporary 1- and 2-bedroom suites come with living areas, minibars and private decks. Some add mezzanine levels and/or free-standing baths in the bathrooms.
 Freebies include airport transfers and meals at the resort’s upscale restaurant, plus use of leisure equipment such as snorkels and bikes. The yurt-based spa offers Ayurvedic treatments. Children 6 and over are welcome.
searchString: caravan parks Lord Howe Island NSW

title: Milky Way Holiday Accommodation
address: 1 Old Settlement Beach, Lord Howe Island NSW 2898, Australia
searchString: caravan parks Lord Howe Island NSW

title: Beachcomber Lodge
description: Laid-back apartment hotel offering a BBQ area, a restaurant & a furnished verandah, plus boat tours.
address: Anderson Rd, Lord Howe Island NSW 2898, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set amid gardens, this down-to-earth apartment hotel is a 7-minute walk from the white-sand Neds Beach, 3 km from Lord Howe Island Airport and 6 km from Mount Gower.
 Accommodations range from warmly furnished studios to an informal 2-bedroom cottage. All offer flat-screen TVs, DVD players and kitchenettes, plus Wi-Fi access, fans, and patios or private gardens. Some have separate living areas.
 Freebies include a local area shuttle and airport transfers. There's also a relaxed restaurant, a furnished verandah and a BBQ area, plus guest laundry facilities and boat tours.
searchString: caravan parks Lord Howe Island NSW

title: Capella Lodge, Beckons
description: Chic rooms in a tropical island retreat featuring a pool, a Pacific-inspired restaurant and a spa.
address: Lagoon Rd, Lord Howe Island NSW 2898, Australia
hotelDescription:
This upscale island lodge, set between volcanic peaks and the beach on Lord Howe Island in the Tasman Sea, is 1.3 km from Mount Gower and 3.1 km from Lord Howe Island Golf Club.
 The 9 airy, chic suites provide ocean and mountain views, flat-screen TVs/DVD players, free Wi-Fi and decks/balconies. They also include stone bathrooms with rain showers, and some rooms add private plunge pools and electric buggies.
 Freebies include use of snorkelling gear, lagoon canoes and mountain bikes. There's a tropical-themed restaurant serving contemporary Pacific cuisine, plus a horizon pool and spa services. Children age 10 and older are welcome.
searchString: caravan parks Lord Howe Island NSW

title: Somerset Apartments
description: Simple apartments with balconies & kitchenettes, plus a free shuttle bus & BBQ facilities.
address: Neds Beach Rd, Lord Howe Island NSW 2898, Australia
hotelDescription:
A 5-minute walk from Lagoon Beach and in a subtropical palm grove setting, this down-to-earth apartment is a 5-minute walk from Neal's Beach and 5 km from Mount Gower.
 The 1- to 3-bedroom, casual apartments feature balconies with tropical views, lounges and kitchenettes. Upgraded apartments add stove tops and additional beds. Room service is available.
 Amenities include a courtesy shuttle bus for airport transfers, a library, a BBQ and laundry facilities.

title: Pinetrees Lodge
description: Oceanfront spa resort with tranquil rooms and cottages on a scenic island, plus fine dining.
address: 1 Lagoon Rd, Lord Howe Island NSW 2898, Australia
hotelDescription:
Overlooking Lagoon Beach and set on secluded Lord Howe island, this refined spa resort is 3.6 km from Mount Gower.
 Serene rooms and cottages have chic decor and either hardwood decks with day beds, or gardens. Suites add separate living rooms, minifridges, iPod docks and Nespresso machines. Cottages also include dining areas; larger cottages add kitchens. TVs, Wi-Fi and mobile phone coverage are not provided.
 A gourmet choice of breakfast is available, while the fine-dining restaurant also offers afternoon tea and 4-course dinners. Amenities include a spa offering treatments, a tennis court and a self-serve bar with a lagoon-view deck.
